changeSet.author: cinex
changeSet.sql: -- Tạo user vutuongan nếu chưa tồn tại IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE username = 'vutuongan') BEGIN INSERT INTO users (username, email, password, full_name, role, enabled, version, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('vutuongan', 'vutuongan@gmail.com', '$2a$10$S0EBjEByHrlV2VrdLyWqLeg9/aTVwRAWvOy4GQON8xIGn2gMQBCdy', N'Vũ Tuấn An', 'USER', 1, 0, 'system', DATEADD(day, -14, GETDATE()), DATEADD(day, -14, GETDATE())) END
